title: These Three Stocks Had a Terrible 2022. Time to Buy?
text: Stocks of Take-Two Interactive Software, Micron Technology, and Warner Bros. Discovery all tanked.

title: 3 Video Game Stocks to Sell on Slowing Sales
text: The video game industry has had a roller coaster year in 2022. After posting record-breaking sales during the pandemic's peak, the economic reopening caused the gaming market to take a sharp downturn.

title: 2 Gaming Stocks Poised to Rebound
text: The gaming industry boomed due to Covid as people stayed at home more often and many “real world” social activities were shut down. Many people sought gaming to entertain themselves and even socialize with others online.

title: Wisdom Gaming Studios Becomes the Home for T-Wolves Gaming
text: The Minnesota Timberwolves official esports team will build out their new facility at Wisdom Gaming Studios at Mall of America® BLOOMINGTON, Minn. , Dec. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Minnesota Timberwolves and Wisdom Gaming, the emerging leader in esports and gaming entertainment, today announced the company's flagship gaming and esports venue, Wisdom Gaming Studios, will be the new home for T-Wolves Gaming, the official esports team of the Minnesota Timberwolves.

title: Why Take-Two Stock Tumbled by 2% Today
text: Compounding the generally bearish view of tech stocks these days, the company suffers a fresh price-target cut.

title: Cowen names Take-Two stock its best idea for 2023
text: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc (NASDAQ: TTWO) just couldn't catch a bottom in 2022 but a Cowen analyst is convinced that next year will be a meaningfully different story for this video game company.

title: Nate V. Rackiewicz Joins Reset Digital as Chief Data Officer
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Reset Digital, today announced the appointment of Nate V. Rackiewicz as Chief Data Officer, a newly-created role overseeing the company's vision, strategy, and execution of data, analytics, and science across the neuroprogrammatic leader's business.

text: The communication services sector includes companies that use fixed-line networks, as well as those offering wireless access and services.

title: Goldman Sachs Out With 10 Top Tech and Internet Stock Picks for 2023
text: More than once, the technology and internet world has crashed and burned, and often for far different reasons.

title: 3 Video Game Value Stocks to Play This Holiday Season
text: The video game industry has been through a rough year in 2022. High inflation and worsening economic conditions have resulted in lower disposable income, and when budgets are tighter, people begin spending less money on unnecessary expenses such as video games.

title: Why Take-Two Software Stock Beat the Market Today
text: A division of the video game specialist launched a small development fund and inked a deal with a European developer.

title: Private Division Marks 5th Anniversary by Announcing Publishing Partnership with Bloober Team and Unveiling the Private Division Development Fund
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Private Division, a publishing label of Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTWO), today celebrated its 5th anniversary of the label by revealing a publishing agreement with Bloober Team. The independent Polish developer is best known for creating psychological horror games and is working on an upcoming unannounced new survival horror IP in partnership with Private Division. Additionally, the label unveiled the Private Division Development Fund to support smaller independent development teams with project financing and mentorship opportunities to enable them to self-publish their ambitious titles. Private Division is also marking their 5th anniversary by releasing a video highlighting its internal studios and developers they have recently partnered with for upcoming releases.

title: Private Division and Piccolo Studio Announce After Us
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Private Division and Piccolo Studio announced After Us during The Game Awards. This riveting exploration adventure game will launch in Spring 2023 for PC on Steam, and on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. Play as Gaia, the Spirit of Life, to bring hope to a broken planet in a surrealistic, post-human journey. Traverse stunning environments to save the souls of extinct animals and harness Gaia's powers to fight the dangers that plague an inhospitable Earth.

title: Ghost Story Games Reveals Judas, an All-New Single-Player Narrative First-Person Shooter
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Ghost Story Games, the development studio led by game creator Ken Levine, today announced that Judas , an all-new single-player, narrative first-person shooter is in development for the PlayStation®5 computer entertainment system, Xbox Series X|S console systems, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store. The new project was revealed at The Game Awards 2022 as a world premiere unveiled by Geoff Keighley. In conjunction with the project reveal, Ghost Story Games has launched the official pages for Judas on Steam and the Epic Games Store where fans can now add the game to their Wishlist.
